name: worktree-tools
description: Project-local workflows for creating ready-to-run worktrees for ar-002-clubs tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Create ready-to-run worktrees for TU tasks and PR follow-up work
interface.longDescription: Project-local worktree setup workflows for ar-002-clubs. Reads PR or task context, chooses the correct branch, creates a sibling worktree under ../clubs-worktrees, copies required ignored files, and bootstraps the repo so Codex can start coding immediately.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create a ready-to-run worktree for this repo from a TU task, Notion spec, or PR link
